data_quality_note: price.json returned empty likely_rises/likely_falls arrays. net_transfers and ownership fields are null across all players in features.json. price_change_flag='none' for all players — no FPL API cost_change_event recorded this cycle. Analysis below is inferred from price tier, position, team context, and injury flags as proxy indicators.

price_risers.name: Haaland
price_risers.rationale: Highest-priced asset in universe. Premium attackers with no injury flag attract net positive transfers in final GW as managers seek haul potential. GW38 price rise has no in-season impact — informational only.

price_risers.name: M.Salah
price_risers.rationale: Second most expensive player at 14.0. High-ownership archetype; late-season transfer velocity into premium mids historically positive. Not in squad — watchlist target only.

price_risers.name: Saka
price_risers.rationale: Squad player at 10.0. No injury. ARS end-of-season motivation may drive ownership surge. Rise value is cosmetic at GW38.

price_risers.name: Gyokeres
price_risers.rationale: Non-squad watchlist target. High-ceiling FWD at 9.1, no injury or news flag. If ARS need points in GW38, transfer-ins likely.

price_fallers.name: Ekitike
price_fallers.rationale: INJURED — Achilles injury, expected return 01 Jul. Longest outage of any player in universe. Sustained transfer-out pressure is near-certain. Highest-confidence fall signal in the dataset. Not in squad but most urgent fall candidate.

price_fallers.name: Stach
price_fallers.rationale: INJURED — Ankle injury, expected return 01 Jun. Injury-flagged budget mid; transfer-out target at season close.

price_fallers.name: Okafor
price_fallers.rationale: INJURED — Calf injury, expected return 01 Jun. Injured LEE mid at 5.5; managers rotating out injured players at season end creates net outflow.

price_fallers.name: Richards
price_fallers.rationale: INJURED — Ankle injury, expected return 01 Jun. Budget DEF; lower ownership means smaller absolute sell volume but directional fall risk present.

price_fallers.name: Casemiro
price_fallers.rationale: Squad player (bench). No injury but priced above recent output ceiling. GW38 bench clean-ups and MUN form concerns make this a structural fall candidate.

transfer_budget_note: Bank is 0.6m. All chips exhausted. GW38 is the final gameweek — price changes after this deadline carry zero in-season consequence. With only 0.6m in bank, any upgrade >0.6m requires selling a squad asset. Priority is confirming the starting XI is injury-free for GW38. Price velocity signals here are informational for squad value awareness only.

act_now.action: MONITOR — Ekitike fall risk (informational, not in squad)
act_now.reason: Achilles injury with 01 Jul return is the single strongest transfer-out signal in the universe. Any manager holding Ekitike should treat this as a confirmed fall. Most urgent awareness flag even though he is not in the current squad.

transfer_velocity_flags.detail: FPL API net_transfers returned null for all 149 universe players. price.json contains no cost_change_event data. All price_change_flag values are 'none'. Velocity analysis is inference-only from injury and availability status.

Four players carry active injury news. Injured players accumulate net negative transfers over successive gameweeks creating downward price velocity. Confidence medium for Ekitike, Stach, Okafor (higher price or mid-tier = more owners = more sells).
Premium assets at 14.7 and 14.0 often see GW38 transfer-in spikes from managers seeking final-week hauls. Confidence low as GW38 is the last active price window.
